data.name: Waifu Aim Trainer
data.detailed_description:
Now you can train your aim with waifus. Enjoy and relax while shooting waifus!

You can train your aim in the nature and other maps.

About

  • 7 different aim maps
  • Waifu Pictures
  • 4 different weapons
  • 4 different skins
  • Score table
  • Easy - Normal - Hard modes
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: Now you can train your aim with waifus. Enjoy and relax while shooting waifus!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Dual core
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible 1024 VRAM or better
  • 儲存空間: 700 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
